action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 12's training launch failed with a torch.distributed DistNetworkError (TCP rendezvous timeout). The elastic launcher likely tried to bind to the container hostname instead of localhost. No training occurred, so the best test macro_f1 remains 0.4197 from checkpoints_v2/best.pt. We have ~3.2 hours and 18 iterations remaining. Analysis: We can bypass the hostname issue by explicitly setting the rendezvous endpoint to localhost. We also want a stronger classifier (MLP head), better augmentation, differential LR, cosine warmup, label smoothing, and gradient clipping to push macro_f1 higher. A 12-epoch run should take ~1.5-2h based on prior timing. Decision: Rewrite model.py with an MLP head and train.py with robust DDP initialization via torchrun using explicit localhost rendezvous. Launch a 12-epoch training run. Keep the working predict.py unchanged; it already reads head_type/dropout from checkpoint args and uses fp32 TTA.
